code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
    end
    cur = 0
    sign = 1
    has = false
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
  else if b == 43
    sign = 1
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v * 2}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v * 2}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
